title: Add ambient background starfield
description: Add drifting stars to the void background. First visual layer beyond the pixel.

title: Add pixel glow effect
description: Radial glow emanating from the player pixel. Makes the pixel feel alive.

title: Implement movement trail system
description: Fading trail behind the pixel when moving. Shows player movement history.

title: Create floating particle spawner
description: Tiny energy particles that float around the void. Can be absorbed by the pixel.

title: Build score display HUD
description: Minimal heads-up display showing score and absorbed count.

title: Add background grid environment
description: Subtle grid that pulses with movement. Gives depth to the void.

title: Design absorption burst particle effects
description: Particle explosion when absorbing energy. Visual feedback for collecting.

title: Implement enemy AI spawner
description: Red hostile entities that chase the pixel. Death on contact. First challenge.

title: Create absorption field mechanic
description: Hold Space to project a field that pulls nearby particles toward the pixel.

title: Add screen shake VFX system
description: Camera shake on enemy collision. Adds impact to events.

title: Write canary test suite
description: Hidden tests that detect system tampering and unauthorized consensus engine modifications.

title: Security scanner implementation
description: Pattern blocklist checker as a CI pipeline step.

title: Write origin story lore
description: The Pixel awakens in the void. Opening narrative and evolution stage flavor text.

title: Redesign homepage hero section
description: Website update: New hero section with animated pixel evolution. Auto-propagates on merge.

title: Create ONEBIT brand kit
description: Branding: Logo variants, color palette, typography guide. Propagates across all outputs.

title: Add SEO meta tags and sitemap
description: Website update: OG tags, Twitter cards, sitemap. Auto-propagates on merge.

title: Design absorption burst VFX
description: Particle explosion when absorbing energy. 5-10 small particles burst outward from absorption point. Fade and shrink over 20 frames. Match absorbed particle color.

title: Pixel Trail Effect on Mouse Movement
description: A visual feedback system that spawns small colored pixel particles along the mouse cursor path, creating a dynamic trail that fades after 0.5 seconds. Particles should match the game's 1-bit aesthetic with simple square shapes and high contrast colors (white/black or inverted based on background). This enhances interactivity without adding gameplay complexity, making the mouse feel responsive and rewarding during the Origin phase when players are first discovering the game world.

title: Pixel Trail Effect for Mouse Movement
description: Add a visual feedback system that spawns small colored pixel trails following the mouse cursor, creating a sense of interactivity and presence in the void. These trails fade out over 0.5 seconds and vary in color based on score multiplier (white at base, transitioning through cyan/magenta at higher scores). The effect works seamlessly with the Floating Particle Spawner by using the same particle pool system.

title: Pixel Combo Counter with Visual Streak Effect
description: A combo system that tracks consecutive rapid interactions and displays an animated counter that grows larger and changes color (white → yellow → red) as the combo multiplier increases. When the player maintains a combo for 5+ hits, particle bursts intensify and a satisfying pulse effect radiates from the center. This gives early-phase players a rewarding feedback loop and encourages engagement velocity.

title: Input Validation & Cheat Detection System
description: Implement a lightweight anti-cheat module that validates score increments, detects impossible click patterns (>20 clicks/sec), and flags suspicious activities without disrupting legitimate gameplay. Display a subtle 'Integrity: ✓' indicator in the HUD that players can trust, and log anomalies server-side for consensus validation when ONEBIT expands to multiplayer voting.

title: Add adaptive difficulty scaling
description: Track g.score to scale: spawn rate increases, enemies get faster, more HP. Every 50 points increases difficulty tier. Cap at tier 10.

title: Implement score streak mechanic
description: Track rapid absorptions within 2-second windows. Chain counter shows "x2", "x3" etc. Multiplies score gains. Visual: multiplier text floats up from player. Resets after 2s idle.

title: Create evolution stage transitions
description: When absorption threshold reached, trigger evolution. Flash screen white, shake camera, spawn burst of particles. Player grows larger, changes color. Show stage name text briefly.

title: Collision Detection with Visual Feedback
description: Implements basic collision boundaries that prevent the player pixel from moving outside the canvas while providing visual feedback when attempting to hit edges—a brief red tint flash or edge pixel highlight. This ensures stable prototype gameplay, prevents visual glitches from out-of-bounds movement, and establishes the foundation for future obstacle systems. Works seamlessly with existing Movement Trail module by constraining trail generation within valid bounds.

title: Create dash ability
description: Double-tap movement direction or press SHIFT for burst of speed. 3-second cooldown. Leave bright trail during dash. Brief invulnerability during dash frames.

title: Pixel Collision Feedback System
description: A visual feedback module that triggers when the player collides with starfield particles or grid boundaries, creating a brief directional knockback effect and spawning a small burst of contrasting pixels in the collision direction. This adds tactile gameplay feel, makes collisions rewarding rather than punishing, and helps players understand spatial boundaries during prototype exploration. Integrates with Movement Trail by briefly intensifying trail opacity on impact.

title: Pixel Collision Zones with Visual Feedback
description: Add interactive rectangular collision zones that highlight when the player enters them, creating visual waypoints and exploration incentives. Each zone displays a small pixel-art icon (diamond, star, or circle) that glows brighter as the player gets closer, providing clear spatial navigation feedback. Zones can trigger subtle visual effects like localized particle bursts or grid color shifts to reward discovery without breaking the minimalist aesthetic.

title: Milestone Achievement Toast Notifications
description: A pixel-art toast notification system that appears when players reach score milestones (100, 250, 500, 1000 pts) or trigger difficulty thresholds. Each toast slides in from the top-right corner with a brief 2-second lifespan, displaying achievement text with a subtle pulsing glow effect that matches the game's 1-bit aesthetic. This provides narrative feedback that celebrates player progression and reinforces the sense of growth as the game evolves.

title: Input Validation & Anti-Cheat Collision Detector
description: Implement a module that validates player movement inputs against the grid system and detects impossible state changes (e.g., teleporting beyond grid bounds, score jumps without particle collection, movement speed exceeding physics limits). Visually, legitimate moves render normally while flagged anomalies briefly flash the player sprite red and log suspicious events. This ensures prototype stability while establishing security foundations before multiplayer AI consensus features arrive.

title: Achievement Milestone Announcements
description: A narrative feedback system that triggers contextual messages when players hit score thresholds (e.g., 'pixels aligned,' 'momentum gained,' 'echo spreading'). Messages fade in at screen center with subtle pixel-growth animation, using the existing particle spawner to create celebratory sparks. This gives progression meaning and encourages replayability without requiring UI menus.

title: Collision Boundary Visualization for Debug Mode
description: Add a toggleable visual overlay that renders pixel-perfect collision bounds around the player and all interactive objects in real-time. Display hitbox rectangles as thin outlined squares that change color on collision detection (green = safe, red = collision). This helps QA verify hitbox accuracy across different screen resolutions and movement speeds, ensuring the Adaptive Difficulty system triggers correctly and Screen Shake VFX fires only on valid collisions.

title: Implement shield mechanic
description: Press E to activate shield. Absorbs 3 hits then breaks. Cooldown 10 seconds. Visual: rotating hexagonal barrier around player. Flashes on hit.

title: Create power-up spawner
description: Rare floating power-ups: SPEED (blue, 2x speed 5s), MAGNET (yellow, auto-absorb 5s), SHIELD (green, temporary barrier). Spawn every 30s. Distinct visual shapes.

title: Add environmental hazards
description: Pulsing danger zones that damage player on contact. Red circular areas that expand and contract. Spawn at random positions. Warn with flashing before activating.

title: Pixel Pickup Combo Counter with Visual Burst
description: A combo multiplier system that triggers when the player collects floating particles in rapid succession without gaps. The counter displays as a cascading pixel stack in the upper-right corner that grows taller with each consecutive pickup, resets on miss, and triggers an expanding ring VFX burst at the center when combos reach milestones (5, 10, 15). This integrates with the Score Streak module to amplify rewards and creates rhythm-based gameplay tension.
